plugins.name: shortcut
plugins.description: Auto-dispatch skills and commands when the user types a magic word.

plugins.description: Project Leader agent — plans, dispatches, coordinates the scrum team.

plugins.name: agent-ward
plugins.description: Architect agent — system design, API design, and tech stack decisions.

plugins.name: agent-hale
plugins.description: Developer agent — writes clean, robust and maintainable code.

plugins.name: agent-ellis
plugins.description: QA agent — code review, test execution, and acceptance verification.

plugins.name: agent-twain
plugins.description: Technical Writer agent — user docs, API docs, and migration guides.

plugins.name: agent-page
plugins.description: SRE agent — observability, reliability, and performance review.

plugins.name: agent-ross
plugins.description: Release Manager agent — CI/CD, Docker, cloud deploy, and release tagging.

plugins.name: spec-writer
plugins.description: Writes technical specifications with architecture diagrams.

plugins.name: tenth-man
plugins.description: Devil's advocate that challenges assumptions and surfaces risks.

plugins.name: ascii-grapher
plugins.description: Draw ASCII diagrams for architecture, flows, and concepts.

plugins.name: test-runner
plugins.description: Detects test framework and runs the project test suite.

plugins.name: changelog-gen
plugins.description: Generates changelog from git history using conventional commits.

plugins.name: dep-auditor
plugins.description: Audits dependencies for vulnerabilities and outdated packages.

plugins.name: compactor
plugins.description: Re-render the previous result into a compact, table-like view.

plugins.name: sec-review
plugins.description: Whole-project security reviewer mapping findings to CWE.
